question_text: Which of the following best describes what asteroids are?

options.label: A
options.text: Small rocky objects that orbit the Sun, mainly found in the asteroid belt between Mars and Jupiter

options.label: B
options.text: Frozen balls of ice and dust that only appear near Earth

options.label: C
options.text: Moons that have broken free from planets

options.label: D
options.text: Pieces of planets that have been destroyed by collisions

explanation: Asteroids are small rocky bodies that orbit the Sun. Most are found in the asteroid belt between Mars and Jupiter, though some have orbits that bring them closer to Earth.
